title: Northern Corridor (Ontario) - Canada.ca
content:
## Northern Corridor Ontario

## Northern Corridor Ontario
The Northern Corridor is a dynamic Francophone region in Northern Ontario where nature meets the vitality of the communities. Each community is a welcoming place that promotes work-life balance by offering a variety of social, cultural and outdoor activities. The Northern Corridor is located between Hearst and Matheson, on Highway 11, and includes Timmins.
Where is the Northern Corridor?
